name: Andre Russell
playingCareerSummary: One of T20 cricket's most explosive all-rounders and two-time T20 World Cup winner with West Indies: 1 Test, 56 ODIs, 84 T20Is. Played for Delhi Daredevils and Kolkata Knight Riders (2014-2025) in the IPL, winning the 2014 and 2024 titles with KKR as a central figure.
bio: Transitioned into the first-ever franchise 'Power Coach' role at KKR for IPL 2026 after retiring as a player — a unique specialist role focused on power-hitting development. Remains with the franchise where he spent most of his playing career.

perSeason.notes: First season as head coach. Stats will update as matches complete. Taking over after Chandrakant Pandit's three-year contract ended.

tenures.notes: 'Power Coach' — a unique specialist role created by KKR after Russell's retirement, focused on power-hitting development. Modelled as 'assistant-coach' in the schema.
